summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife v2 Dashboard & Efficiency Engine. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, dashboard display, navigation, and template features.
passed_tests: Login with builder@test.com / builder123 works and redirects to /quotes/create
Dashboard at /quotes loads and displays 2 quotes correctly
Status stats display correctly: Drafts=1, Sent=1, Accepted=0
Client names displayed: Mrs. Sarah Jenkins and Dave Thompson
Quote amounts formatted correctly from BigInt: £2,625.00 and £4,200.00
Profit amounts displayed in green: £437.50 and £1,750.00
Status badges show correct colors for Draft and Sent
Search functionality filters quotes by client name
Navigation works: Quotes, Jobs, Settings links functional
Import Template button opens dropdown with 'No templates yet' message
Save as Template bookmark icon present in section headers
Jobs page shows coming soon placeholder
Settings page shows coming soon placeholder
Sign out works and redirects to login page
